title: Hypno's Origins+
description: An RPG-style mod that focuses on Origins, with magic!
body:
![Hypno's Origins+ Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b73752d6f4a4a5460ab664ddba220068e4b57b.png)
### Hypno's Origins+ is a modpack based around [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)(and some of its addons) that adds starting classes, deities and more! The pack is highly tuned to eliminate over-powered Origins and make adventuring rewarding.

The mod works great in singleplayer, and should run fine on servers. The mod was designed with multiplayer in mind but there should be no differences running the game in singleplayer.

# Featuring Five Custom Origins
### Anthroparion, Tridae, Abraxian, Cithan, and the Dynamis!
Made special for this pack, with love and well-balanced for seamless integration into any play experience!

<details>
<summary>More Info</summary>

The **Anthroparion** are an origin designed around caves, and more specifically the mining of them. They traverse terrain with ease, but they become weak at high altitudes.

The **Tridae** are a highly versatile origin, focused around utility and mobility in order to build and explore effectively, at the cost of being weaker physically.

The **Abraxians** are an origin designed around defense and nether exploration, boasting high survivability and offense at the cost of having many overworld-based weaknesses.

The **Cithan** are a strange origin with heavy downsides, along with great boons. They are highly agile- but very weak, unless they're low on health, in which case they're a force to be reckoned with.

The **Dynamis** are a race of people whom sacrificed their soul in attempts to achieve immortality, a process that left them 'perfected', at the cost of very few surviving. They walk the world isolated and unnatural, yet steady and wise.

</details>

On top of picking your origin, you can also pick a deity, class, divine aspect, and player size!


# Also includes

<details>
<summary>View Highlighted Features</summary>

**Rituals**

Cast powerful spells and curse your opponents with the _Bewitchment_ mod, and its companion mod _Besmirchment_! Summon demons, become one with the supernatural, and more!

**Gravestones**

Prevent your items from spilling everywhere when you die!

**New Biomes**

Find new places to explore both above and below ground, and in every dimension!

**Custom Origins**

Select from a hand-picked array of origins designed for synergy, and some custom origins made from scratch for this pack!

**Backpacks**

Keep your storage organized and your inventory free!

**Celestial Events**

Randomly encounter Blood Moons, Harvest Moons, and more!

**Tree Felling**

No more pesky building up to the top of a tree to break it!

**Minimap/World Map**

Unlock more of the map as you traverse the land!

**Togglable PvP**

Never accidentally hit your friend again!
</details>

### And **_so much more!_** Check out the dependencies in the version you download for a full list of included mods.

# For Server Owners:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- It's recommended to enable `allow-flight` for best results, or some items may not function as intended(like the broom in Bewitched).
- PvP is DISABLED by default! It can be toggled by players using a keybind, and if both players have PvP enabled, they can fight.
</details>
